methods.name: system.status
methods.description: Ollama running? default model? RAM? sandbox available?

methods.name: config.set
methods.description: Set one config key, persist, return the new config.

methods.name: models.list
methods.description: List locally installed Ollama models (+ VRAM compatibility).

methods.name: models.pull
methods.description: Pull a model; emits models.pull_progress notifications.

methods.name: models.set_default
methods.description: Set the default model in config.

methods.name: files.add
methods.description: Copy files into the workspace; return their FileEntry records.

methods.name: files.remove
methods.description: Remove a workspace file by id or name.

methods.name: files.clear
methods.description: Remove every workspace file; returns count removed.

methods.name: sessions.list
methods.description: List saved sessions (name, saved_at, model, n_turns).

methods.name: sessions.save
methods.description: Save a session under a name.

methods.name: chat.send
methods.description: Run a full chat turn (stream + auto-run loop). Emits chat.* events.

methods.name: chat.run_last
methods.description: Re-run the most recent python block (the /run escape hatch).

methods.name: chat.cancel
methods.description: Request cancellation of an in-flight turn.

methods.name: ollama.ensure_running
methods.description: Best-effort: confirm/launch the local Ollama daemon.

events.name: chat.token
events.description: A streamed chunk of the assistant reply.

events.name: chat.message_done
events.description: A full assistant message was committed.

events.name: chat.run_start
events.description: A python block is about to run in the sandbox.

events.name: chat.run_output
events.description: The sandbox finished running a block.

events.name: chat.turn_done
events.description: The whole turn (incl. auto-run loop) completed.

events.name: chat.error
events.description: A recoverable error during a turn.
